title: Restore working admin UI login flow and correct error messaging

requirements.summary: Ensure the existing AdminLoginCard + useAdminSession admin login flow correctly transitions to the admin dashboard, stores the token, shows the exact invalid-password message, and shows a service-unavailable message for backend/method/candid failures.
acceptanceCriteria: With a working backend, entering the correct password results in the admin session token being stored in `localStorage` under `admin_session_token` and the UI transitions into the authenticated admin experience.
Entering a wrong password shows exactly: "Invalid password. Please try again."
If the backend is unreachable or the admin methods are missing/mismatched, the UI displays: "Service unavailable. Please try again later." (English-only).

file_operations.description: Normalize all admin login failure modes (backend unreachable, method missing/mismatch, candid/argument decode issues, unexpected variants, empty token) to throw exactly "Service unavailable. Please try again later.", while preserving the exact invalid-password error "Invalid password. Please try again.". Keep persisting successful tokens to localStorage under `admin_session_token` and validating tokens via `validateAdminSession` as currently designed.

Ensure the login form displays the exact error message surfaced by useAdminSession, and that any local fallback message (when an error lacks a message) is exactly "Service unavailable. Please try again later." (English-only). Do not modify any files under `frontend/src/components/ui`.

Confirm the Admin Dashboard section continues to render AdminDashboard when useAdminSession reports authenticated and AdminLoginCard otherwise, so a successful login visibly transitions into the admin dashboard experience without adding new routes/pages.
